Manage Consent

To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behavior or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.

FunctionalFunctional
Always active

The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.

PreferencesPreferences

The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.

StatisticsStatistics

The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes.The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.

MarketingMarketing

The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.

## Union Election Information and Guidelines

As a Local 509 member, there are many opportunities to become more involved in your union. Make sure to bookmark this page as we update it frequently. Our union thrives when our members get involved. We hope you’ll join us in shaping the future of our Local.

**Interested in becoming a Chapter President, Chapter Board Member, or Union Steward?** [**Click here to read our role descriptions.**](https://www.seiu509.org/documents/job-descriptions-elected-officers-2/)

[**Click here for the Local 509 Election Policies & Procedures**](https://www.seiu509.org/documents/election-guide-july-2022-english/) (updated July 2022).

[**Haga clic aquí para conocer las Políticas y Procedimientos Electorales del Local 509**](https://www.seiu509.org/documents/election-guide-july-2022-spanish/) (actualizado el julio de 2022).

[**Règleman ak Pwosedi pou Eleksyon Jeneral Local 509**](https://www.seiu509.org/documents/election-guide-july-2022-haitian-creole/) (Amande an jiyè 2022).

## Nomination Guidelines

- Nominations will be accepted on a quarterly basis in January, April, July, and at October’s annual meeting, where nominations are only taken from the floor. In January, April, and July, nominations will be accepted via email at [governance@seiu509.org](mailto:governance@seiu509.org). Nominations do not need to be seconded, except at an annual meeting.
- If we receive more than one nomination for a seat and more than one member accepts the nomination, an election will be held.
- Only members in good standing are eligible for nomination. **Members must be dues payers for 6 months prior to holding office.** Members may nominate themselves or be nominated by fellow SEIU 509 members. The nominating member also needs to be a member in good standing.

Questions regarding the nomination process? Email [governance@seiu509.org](mailto:governance@seiu509.org).
